violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Observed home canned items in refrigerator.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood needs to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed vent hood has grease build up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls and ceiling need a wipe down, Especially around fryer.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
